text.message: one for you one for me?
you guys can duke that out
I’ve been blocked 5 times already, fun
I offered that trade but didn’t get it, rough start
i took it with black because he was over 7
Yeah, not sure why I was the target instead of him
i mean its a shared 8 ore
why give him a city 1 for 1
i can do that with the bank lol
